Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

It's about time the upstream kernel got a helper function for this.
Not just persistent_memory_page() (in dm) or kmem_to_page() (in xfs) or dma_common_vaddr_to_page (in kernel/dma) or pvg_to_page() (in net), but something that everyone can use...

parents.subject: LU-17043 enc: fix osd lookup cache for long encrypted names

commit.subject: LU-12678 lnet: discard lnet_kvaddr_to_page
commit.message:
LU-12678 lnet: discard lnet_kvaddr_to_page

This function is not needed, so discard it.
